research_gate: C4 is verified, complete and recorded after GitHub-hosted Linux execution, retained cryptographic replay and registered full gate run-bc2154f73f6243239910ac30bc3b1994. C5 may reconcile requirements and freeze readiness evidence; source remains blocked until the exact closure surface and hostile matrix are complete.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized broad C5 significance/scheduler reconciliation and capability-free closure readiness only. Exact dependency C4. No C3B, C6, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controllers, runtime executors, cache mutation, storage mutation, product weights, AI generation, rendering implementation, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual assets or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4 is verified, complete and recorded after closure run-bc2154f73f6243239910ac30bc3b1994. The hardened C5-successor verifier surface is bound to clean source 17f39f7, tracked tree 3b0bb235, bounded source b31d92b7 and GitHub-hosted run 29674024317 result 2430d210; strict import, retained replay and post-transition registered full gate run-71ef6dfd6e2945ab9745c85f3dcf4d6b pass. C5 is the sole active reconciliation/readiness item. C6, C7, broad G1 closure and R1 remain gated.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 consumes exact C2 and promoted C3A; C3B physical and presentation evidence is independent and blocked.
Population ecology and species presentation belong to C6, rendered visual proof belongs to C7, and runtime storage belongs to R1.
C4 is verified and complete; C5 is the sole active item. C6-C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
micro_findings: Stable dynamic identity, four-state presence, retained ambient cohort binding, exact dependency availability, typed prefix recovery, topology refusal and one/two-hop migrations pass hostile tests.
The semantic receipt replays the exact C3A input and packet through addressable-world-binding and binds pinned deterministic cost rows.
Two fresh Windows x64 processes and same-host i686 execution emit semantic SHA-256 263a7c274c5bbfb5a48f0a7ccf3462eb35ddc7c96c1c92ff01d8ef37a40f6996.
Android aarch64 compilation is compile-only; independent platform-diverse execution remains a separate receipt.

The retained fixture lock and 27-path blob manifest bind the portable proof surface; 36 external hostiles and 15 retained-replay hostiles reject forged policy, source, runner, artifact, output, attestation, retention and authority evidence.

The public GitHub repository is connected. Hosted run 29671494578 separated read-only execution from attestation authority and was rejected locally before import when it exposed CRLF/LF tree serialization drift.

Canonical LF tree binding for the hardened C5-successor surface is clean source 17f39f7018de8a02c8292bcde0fafa2bf58fc7d4 with tracked-tree SHA-256 3b0bb235e5a3159ecba5b4d34acfd6157725773af79584e3b801283b8442e4dd and bounded-source SHA-256 b31d92b7ebf36540a64249192fca96d83537c01932ededf84c94e1a886acc108.

tiers_completed.result: All 58 core hostile IDs and exact deterministic cost rows pass in capability-free Rust fixtures.
Exact C2+C3A semantic receipt, eight receipt hostiles, two fresh native processes, same-host i686 execution, Android compile and C4V regression pass.
Thirty-six external receipt hostiles and pinned workflow-control assertions fail closed without granting independence.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: The retained C5 fixture covers four domains but not every master-plan consumer or the complete hostile scheduler surface.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Identify the smallest complete capability-free C5 contract and hostile matrix before implementation.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: Bounded canonical and code reconciliation first; no runtime or integrated product execution is authorized.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No C3B, C6-C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controller or executor, cache, storage, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual asset or Kernel mutation.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop before source if any named domain, fairness obligation, fallback rule, authority exclusion or deterministic hostile case remains ambiguous.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Post-transition registered regression run-71ef6dfd6e2945ab9745c85f3dcf4d6b passed; another registered gate remains required after a separately accepted C5 implementation candidate.

exit_criteria.label: C5 depends exactly on verified C4 and imports no C3B, later-system, storage or runtime authority.
Every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming obligation is mapped to one shared significance truth.
Deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation and thrash hostiles are frozen before source.
A separately authorized C5 implementation, focused regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C6.

unresolved_risks: The retained C5 fixture covers four domains and does not yet prove complete named-domain dispatch, admission, budgets, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation or thrash behavior.
evidence_requirements: retain exact verified C4 as C5's sole dependency
inventory every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming consumer
freeze deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation and fairness obligations
define hostile starvation, thrash, forged-priority and truth-fork cases before source
keep C6-C7, G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 gated and unchanged
verification_plan: reconcile all canonical C5 requirements and retained fixture evidence
audit the scheduler implementation surface without granting runtime authority
freeze the exact C5 readiness contract and hostile matrix
obtain independent readiness review before source
run focused and registered gates only after a separately authorized implementation candidate exists
resume_after: Continue only through C5 reconciliation and capability-free readiness. Do not activate C6 automatically.
evidence: GP3 closed cleanly in commit 7f29f6b and registered run-50a8c78043eb46c483f1f655d3793f9b.
C4V closed cleanly in commit 34f2213 and registered run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e.
The owner rejected an early runtime shortcut and authorized continuation of the canonical broad route C4-C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 depends exactly on C2 and promoted C3A; C3B remains independent and blocked.
Four existing C4-owned modules pass 33 of 33 focused tests while retaining no runtime, storage, network or filesystem capability.
Independent GP4 pre-source acceptance recorded after the composed readiness gate passed in 73.9 seconds with the source crate absent and all exact hostile mutations failing closed.
Both independent reviewers accepted the source candidate after 9 of 9 focused hostile tests, strict received-evidence replay, capability audit, formatting and focused clippy passed.
The 100.8-second GP4 focused integration verifier passed formatting, clippy, 9 hostile vertical tests, retained GP0-GP3 and C4V tests, computation readiness and all readiness hostiles.

G1_VERTICAL_CLOSEOUT_RECEIPT.json remains immutable verified predecessor evidence.
Three independent read-only audits identified the minimal C4 closure route and exact stale canonical claims before source.

Two fresh native processes and same-host Windows i686 execution emitted identical semantic bytes; aarch64-linux-android compiled only. None is independent second-platform execution.
The bounded 27-path C4 implementation, fixture and verification source manifest SHA-256 is 022e29d8cbc31459656ac36aabcefe656632005f6df47057b97185b57bad5557.

Local platform observations bind clean source commit f505c82bc9303b3426a4530d0a8deec6eede400a and canonical LF-normalized tracked-tree manifest SHA-256 f9089b4d62bd789c514c152e600607fcdeb0b762c0888b19115feb193b7f0e8b.

GitHub-hosted run 29671881585 independently executed and attested clean source 8651038; strict import created G1_C4_INDEPENDENT_PLATFORM_EXECUTION.json with receipt SHA-256 75d27618497c5432c10f86fd2dd25759185238cd3bbf264a583b3743b228542b.

The first registered post-import gate replayed the C4 attestation, then failed on C3 closure-register retention drift; the register now preserves current superseded-C3/promoted-C3A/blocked-C3B truth plus residual/ecotone anchors, and all five affected focused shields pass.

The second registered attempt passed the C3 repair and later failed because three retained GP3/GP4/vertical-closeout verifiers omitted only c4-independent-platform-gate; exact-stage additions and the existing forged-route successor suite now pass without widening authority.

The third registered attempt passed through retained hosted-attestation replay and the repaired successor routes, then failed because the local observation verifier incorrectly required historical and rebuilt MSVC debug PE bytes to match. Two clean target-directory builds produced distinct executable hashes with exact semantic output; the bounded repair validates both hashes as per-execution identities without weakening hosted same-run artifact equality.

GitHub-hosted run 29672946787 independently executed and attested exact repaired source f505c82; strict import and retained cryptographic replay verify result SHA-256 733d453f0831cdaafefa9d4a9e24b1494f339b0b56f4441264009c9fcc3254cd. The prior 8651038 receipt remains archived intact.
